# submitAppInviteCode

<!-- @constructive-io/graphql-codegen - DO NOT EDIT -->

React Query mutation hook for submitAppInviteCode

## Usage

```typescript
const { mutate } = useSubmitAppInviteCodeMutation(); mutate({ input: { token: '<String>' } });
```

## Examples

### Use useSubmitAppInviteCodeMutation

```typescript
const { mutate, isLoading } = useSubmitAppInviteCodeMutation();
mutate({ input: { token: '<String>' } });
```
